_readme: This one file drives the whole comparison tool. Edit it, commit, done.
affiliateTag  Your Amazon Associates tag, e.g. nexedge-20.
While this is empty, buy buttons are hidden entirely so the
site never ships untagged links that earn nothing.
DO NOT put prices in here. Amazon requires displayed prices to be
refreshed or removed within 24 hours, and anything you type will be stale
within days. Use the budget band instead and let Amazon show the price.
category  must match one of the category ids below
budget    must match one of the budget ids below
asin      Amazon ASIN, found in the product URL (/dp/XXXXXXXXXX)
verdict   one honest sentence. This is the whole point of the page.
specs     any key/value pairs you want compared. Keys line up across
products in the same category, so keep them consistent.
pick      optional. true marks it as your recommendation in that band.
